ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, account manager, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_types" (
  "account_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account type */,
  "account_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the account type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the account type */,
  "min_balance" REAL /* Minimum balance required for the account type */,
  "max_balance" REAL /* Maximum balance allowed for the account type */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for the account type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "account_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account type */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_account_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_type_id") REFERENCES account_types ("account_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "transaction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_categories" (
  "transaction_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction category */,
  "transaction_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction type */,
  "transaction_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction category */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_category_id") REFERENCES transaction_categories ("transaction_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_history" (
  "transaction_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction history entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "balance_before" REAL /* Account balance before the transaction */,
  "balance_after" REAL /* Account balance after the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_managers" (
  "account_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account manager */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account managed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account manager was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account manager was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_managers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_managers_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, logout, update) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource affected by the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
